package rulecoverage

func PositiveDistinctWideRowRequestPath() string {
    ruleID := "distinct_wide_row_request_path"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Distinct on wide rows without Select projection \u2014 a key-only subquery is usually cheaper."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
